notes: Iteration #80 (Campaign SMA-32892): VPVR variant V4 — narrow V3 (#75) universe to BTCUSDT/SOLUSDT only.
V3 (#75) BTCUSDT/ETHUSDT pair was a drag (sharpe 0.282). BTCUSDT/SOLUSDT was the only pair that beat
the 0.5 evidence gate on its own (sharpe 0.568 in V3 per-pair breakdown). Dropping the ETH drag is
expected to let the SOL pair's signal be measured cleanly; identical otherwise (vpvr_window_bars=60,
Pairs: BTCUSDT/SOLUSDT only. BTC resampled 1h→4h on the fly (canonical 4h parquet not present
for BTC); SOLUSDT loaded from native 4h parquet.
